messages.body: # Group 6: @Mention Humans + Inbox Mentions You are in an ISOLATED WORKTREE at /tmp/paperclip-g6 on branch feat/g6-mentions. You are already on the correct branch — do NOT switch branches or checkout dev. ## CONTEXT Read `.genie/wishes/complete-multiuser/WISH.md` (Group 6 section + UI Design Specs for Inbox Mentions, MarkdownEditor, MarkdownBody). ## DELIVERABLES ### 1. Rename findMentionedAgents → findMentions In `server/src/routes/issues.ts` (or wherever findMentionedAgents is): - Change to `findMentions()` returning `{ agentIds: string[], userIds: string[] }` - Match @name against both agent names AND user names from companyMemberships+authUsers ### 2. User mention activity + email When human mentioned in comment: - Log activity `"issue.user_mentioned"` with `{ userId, issueId, commentId }` - Send mention email via emailService (if configured) ### 3. Mentions API endpoint Add `GET /companies/:companyId/mentions?userId=me` — returns issues where user was mentioned ### 4. Inbox Mentions section (`ui/src/pages/Inbox.tsx`) - Add "Mentions" to InboxCategoryFilter type - Query and display mentions using existing inbox card patterns ### 5. MarkdownEditor user autocomplete In `ui/src/components/MarkdownEditor.tsx`: - Add `kind: "user"` to MentionOption type - Show company members in @autocomplete dropdown alongside agents/projects - Group by kind with section headers ### 6. IssueDetail mentionOptions In `ui/src/pages/IssueDetail.tsx`: - Include company members from /people endpoint in mentionOptions ### 7. MarkdownBody @mention highlighting In `ui/src/components/MarkdownBody.tsx`: - Detect @\w+ patterns and wrap in `@name` ### 8. Inbox badge count In `ui/src/lib/inbox.ts`: add mentions to badge count ## VALIDATION ```bash pnpm -r typecheck && pnpm test:run && pnpm build ``` Push when done: ```bash git add -A && git commit -m "feat: add @mention humans + inbox mentions (Group 6)" && git push -u origin feat/g6-mentions ```
